appsync_target.description: Defines the AppSync targets with optional GraphQL operations for event rules, allowing flexibility in specifying the operations.

arn.description: Please specify the ARN of the target; it is mandatory for resource creation.

batch_target.description: Configures AWS Batch as a target with necessary job details like job name and job definition, and optional parameters such as array size and job attempts.

dead_letter_config.description: Defines the dead-letter queue configuration using an optional ARN, facilitating error handling by redirecting failed events.

ecs_target.description: Specifies ECS task details as targets, including mandatory task definition ARN and optional settings like launch type, network configuration, and placement strategies.
ecs_target.type: list(object({enable_ecs_managed_tags: optional(bool),enable_execute_command: optional(bool),group: optional(string),launch_type: optional(string),platform_version: optional(string),propagate_tags: optional(string),tags: optional(map(string)),task_count: optional(number),task_definition_arn: string,capacity_provider_strategy: list(object({base: optional(number),capacity_provider: string,weight: optional(number)})),network_configuration: list(object({assign_public_ip: optional(bool),security_groups: optional(list(string)),subnets: list(string)})),ordered_placement_strategy: list(object({field: optional(string),type: string})),placement_constraint: list(object({expression: optional(string),type: string}))}))

event_bus_name.description: Names the event bus to associate with rules, allowing separation of event sources and targets; optional unless using a custom event bus.

force_destroy.description: Indicates whether to forcefully delete resources when destroying, which is useful for resources with dependencies.

http_target.description: Defines HTTP endpoints as targets with optional parameter configurations for headers, path, and query strings.

input.description: Specifies the input passed to the event target, allowing data customization for processing.

input_path.description: Defines the JSON path to extract data from the event before passing it to the target, allowing precise data handling.

input_transformer.description: Transforms the input data using specified paths and templates, enabling dynamic data manipulation for event targets.

kinesis_target.description: Targets a Kinesis stream with optional partition key path for organizing data flow, useful in real-time processing scenarios.

redshift_target.description: Configures Redshift as a target with necessary details like database name and optional SQL statements for data operations.
redshift_target.type: list(object({database: string,db_user: optional(string),secrets_manager_arn: optional(string),sql: optional(string),statement_name: optional(string),with_event: optional(bool)}))

retry_policy.description: Sets retry policies for handling event processing failures, with optional parameters for maximum event age and retry attempts.

role_arn.description: Specifies the IAM role ARN that provides permissions for event targets, essential for resource access control.

rule.description: Defines the event rule that triggers specified targets, essential for orchestrating event-driven workflows.

run_command_targets.description: Specifies targets for running commands, detailing keys and values to identify instances or EC2 tags.

sagemaker_pipeline_target.description: Targets a SageMaker pipeline with specified parameter lists, facilitating machine learning workflows integration.

sqs_target.description: Configures SQS queue targets with optional message group ID for FIFO queues, ensuring message ordering.

target_id.description: Assigns an identifier to the event target, aiding in distinguishing between multiple targets within a rule.
